name: galaxy-performance-sample
description: Sample canvas rendering performance: FPS detection, render timing, canvas data URL size, consistency across multiple game states

args.expression: (function(){ var c = document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return 'no canvas'; var data = c.toDataURL(); return { width: c.width, height: c.height, dataLen: data.length, aspect: (c.width/c.height).toFixed(2) }; })()

steps.description: Canvas dimensions + data URL size at menu

args.expression: (function(){ var c = document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return 'no canvas'; var data = c.toDataURL(); return { dataLen: data.length, timestamp: Date.now() }; })()

steps.description: Canvas data URL size at gameplay

args.expression: (function(){ try { if(window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL){ window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL(15); return 'jumped LV15'; } return 'no hook'; } catch(e) { return 'error: '+e.message; } })()

steps.description: Jump to boss level for heavy rendering test

args.expression: (function(){ var c = document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return 'no canvas'; var data = c.toDataURL(); return { dataLen: data.length, timestamp: Date.now(), enemies: typeof enemies !== 'undefined' ? enemies.length : '?', bullets: typeof enemyBullets !== 'undefined' ? enemyBullets.length : '?' }; })()

steps.description: Canvas data URL size during boss combat

args.expression: (function(){ if(window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL){ window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL(20); return 'jumped LV20'; } return 'no hook'; })()

steps.description: Jump to LV20 for max rendering test
Wait for boss + bullets at LV20

args.expression: (function(){ var c = document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return 'no canvas'; var data = c.toDataURL(); return { dataLen: data.length, timestamp: Date.now(), enemies: typeof enemies !== 'undefined' ? enemies.length : '?', bullets: typeof enemyBullets !== 'undefined' ? enemyBullets.length : '?' }; })()

steps.description: Canvas data URL size at LV20 boss
